top_patterns.description: Opens with a personal memory or experience, then shares a lesson or insight.
example_quotes: I remember this day like it was yesterday. It was a beautiful, fun, hilarious moment that was a lesson to me...
The day I sold TOMS I didn’t feel successful. Here’s what I learned from that experience…

top_patterns.description: Ends with a prompt for followers to comment, share, or reflect.
top_patterns.structure_template: Let me know in the comments… / Share with someone who…
example_quotes: Take a moment to thank someone who’s been part of your healing journey in the comments 👇
If you’ve been to the retreat too, I’d love to hear your experience 👇

top_patterns.description: Shares a motivational, spiritual, or life lesson, often with a hashtag or call to action.
example_quotes: It’s not always visible, like a broken bone, but it can be just as painful.
Because sometimes our greatest breakthrough isn’t another goal, it’s finally discovering we were already enough.
I promised Scott I would seize every single day. For 30 years I have signed every note with two words: Carpe Diem.
Walking the Camino wasn’t about getting anywhere. It was about coming back to myself.
Let’s make healing something we do together! Take a moment to thank someone who’s been part of your healing journey in the comments 👇
This October, I’ll be back in Baja at the Modern Elder Academy, teaching a new kind of workshop…

closers: Let me know in the comments
bridge_phrases: which happen to be life changing
because it’s about coming back to myself
language_habits.line_break_style: frequent line breaks for emphasis, often after a thought or quote

example_quotes: I promised Scott I would seize every single day.
I still get asked a lot about this crazy experience I had almost 24 years ago.
Take a moment to thank someone who’s been part of your healing journey in the comments 👇
Let me know in the comments…
It’s not always visible, like a broken bone, but it can be just as painful.
Because sometimes our greatest breakthrough isn’t another goal, it’s finally discovering we were already enough.

anti_patterns: Vague or generic motivational quotes without personal context
Long, dense paragraphs lacking line breaks
Excessive hashtags or calls to action
Lack of personal voice or authenticity

synthesis_notes.what_this_batch_says_about_current_voice: Blake’s current style emphasizes personal storytelling, vulnerability, and community engagement, with a focus on life lessons and reflection.
synthesis_notes.what_changed_vs_older_voice: More direct calls to action and explicit reflection prompts, less formal or corporate tone.
